name: Welcome - new client
when: Day 0 - within 2 hours of first booking
subject: Welcome to the StrongHer movement, {first_name}
preheader: Your first session is locked in. Here is what to expect.
body: Hey {first_name},
I am so glad you said yes. The first decision is always the hardest - everything from here is easier than that one was.
Your first session is {first_session_day} at {first_session_time}. Here is what to bring: water bottle, runners, and an open mind. That is it. No fancy gear needed.
Before we meet, three quick reads (each under 2 minutes):
1. What StrongHer training actually looks like - {link_about}
2. Your home prep checklist - {link_prep}
3. The 4 women-only rules of this space - {link_rules}
If anything comes up before then, hit reply. I read every message myself.
See you {first_session_day}.
Mimi

name: Week 1 check-in
when: Day 7 - after first full week of training
subject: How did week 1 actually feel, {first_name}?
preheader: Real talk - the first week is always the hardest. Hit reply.
body: {first_name},
One week in. You did {sessions_completed_w1} sessions. Your strongest lift so far: {best_lift_w1}.
Here is what I want to know - not the polite answer, the real one:
- How is your body feeling today? Tired-good or tired-too-much?
- What felt amazing last week?
- What felt awful?
Reply with even one word answers. I read every reply and adjust week 2 based on what you tell me.
Most women say week 2 is when their body starts to feel like it remembers. Trust the process.
M

name: Plateau pep talk
when: When a client logs same weight 3+ sessions in a row on a key lift
subject: Plateaus are not stuck - they are leveling up
preheader: Your body is doing something specific right now. Here is what.
body: {first_name},
I noticed your {plateau_lift} has stayed at {plateau_weight} for the last {plateau_sessions} sessions.

Here is the truth: plateaus are not a stop sign, they are a build-up. Your nervous system is laying down new wiring before it lets you express new strength. The work you are doing now is making the breakthrough possible - it just is not visible yet.
Three things we will do this week:
1. Drop the working weight 10 percent, add 2 reps. Volume drives the next jump.
2. One tempo set - 3 second descent. Time under tension flips the switch.
3. Sleep 30 minutes earlier. Recovery is where the strength actually lands.
We will retest {plateau_lift} on {retest_day}. Trust the plan.
M

name: Milestone celebration
when: Auto-fire on first 100kg deadlift, 60kg bench, 80kg squat, 12-week mark, etc.
subject: You just did {milestone_label} - and I am not surprised
preheader: This is the moment we have been building for.
body: {first_name}.
{milestone_label}.
I want you to read that line again. Out loud if you can.
{milestone_context_one_line}
Here is what just changed for you - not the lift. The way you walk into a room. The way you say no when something is not for you. The way your kids see you, if that is part of your story.
Take the rest of today and do something just for you. We will hit the gym again {next_session_day} - new ceiling, new chase.
Proud of you,
Mimi

name: Win-back - inactive client
when: Client has not logged a session in 14+ days, status still active
subject: No pressure, just checking in
preheader: This is not a sales email. Read it anyway.
body: {first_name},
It has been a couple of weeks since I saw you in the gym. I am not writing to chase you - I am writing because I care.
Life happens. Work. Kids. A funeral. A flu that lingered. Things you do not always want to put in writing. I do not need the reason.
Here is what I want you to know:
1. Your spot is still yours. I have not touched your program.
2. Coming back after a break is not starting over. It is starting from where you are. Different thing.
3. If you want to chat first, no training, just coffee - reply with the word 'coffee' and I will send you a time.
I am here when you are ready.
Mimi

name: Seasonal promo - school holidays
when: School holiday windows (NZ) for fit-mum reset campaigns
subject: The fit-mum 4-week reset - school holidays edition
preheader: Limited to 12 spots, real coaching - not a challenge.
body: {first_name},
School holidays start {holiday_start_date}. I am opening 12 spots for the fit-mum reset.
It is 4 weeks. Three 45-minute sessions a week, scheduled around school drop-off. {price_label}.
What you get:
- Custom 4-week program built for your starting point
- A reset on nutrition - no meal plans, just two habits that work
- WhatsApp accountability so you cannot ghost yourself
- A new strongest lift by week 4
Why now: you have time this holiday you do not have during term. Use it on you. The kids will copy what they see.
If you want one of the 12 spots - reply 'in' and I will send you the booking link.
Mimi

name: Referral ask
when: Client at 12+ weeks, milestone achieved, high NPS
subject: A small ask, {first_name}
preheader: Two weeks free for both of you. Read on.
body: {first_name},
You have been with me for {client_weeks} weeks now. You have hit {client_main_milestone}. You moved from {client_starting_state} to {client_current_state}.
I have a small ask. If you know one woman who would benefit from this kind of training, refer her to me. Here is what happens:
- She gets a free 30-minute consult plus 2 weeks free on any program she chooses.
- You get 2 weeks credited back to your account.
- Nobody gets spammed. I do not cold-message. She has to choose to book.
Your referral link: {referral_link}
If nobody comes to mind, no problem at all. The work you are doing is the best advert anyway - people are watching.
Thanks for being here,
Mimi

name: Monthly newsletter
when: First Monday of each month, 7 AM NZ
subject: {month_name} - what is new and what you should care about
preheader: 3 things, all under a minute to read.
body: Hey - quick {month_name} note from the studio.
1. NEW THIS MONTH: {feature_one_line}. Why I added it: {feature_reason_one_line}.
2. STORY OF THE MONTH: {client_story_first_name} hit {client_story_milestone}. She started {client_story_weeks} weeks ago at {client_story_start}. Her quote: '{client_story_quote}'
3. WHAT TO READ: {article_title} - {article_link}. 2-minute read on {article_topic}.
If you want to bring anyone into the studio this month, my schedule is at {booking_link}. School holiday spots fill first.
More soon,
Mimi
